pool.baseline:
hey can u summarize this news article for me? i just wanna know the pros and cons of this new energy bill they're talking about in PA. 

"The Keystone Energy Transition Act (KETA) has been introduced in the state legislature. The bill proposes a massive reallocation of state subsidies, shifting $500 million away from traditional coal mining operations to incentivize the development of large-scale solar farms in western PA. Supporters of the bill claim it is a necessary step toward meeting climate goals and modernizing the state's grid. Opponents, including several labor unions, argue the bill will devastate local economies dependent on coal and lead to significant job losses."
